description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a hip roof and a prominent central chimney. The exterior is clad in light-colored horizontal siding, and the foundation is made of stone. The house features a covered front porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, which is sheltered by an awning. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with double-hung sash windows and a small attic vent on the upper level. The rear of the house has a secondary entrance with a smaller porch and steps, and the overall design suggests an early 20th-century American Foursquare architectural style.
description: A two-story, light-sided house with a hip roof, stone foundation, covered front porch, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Side view showing two stories, stone foundation, and a partial view of the rear porch and steps.
description_view_1: Rear view with a centered door, two windows, and a small attic vent under the roof.
description_view_2: Front view featuring the main entry steps, covered porch with columns, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the full front porch, steps, and a single window on the upper story.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with steps, columns, and an awning over the main door
